summary: WhatsApp Integration Phase testing complete. 8/8 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. Evolution API endpoints handle graceful failures since no real Evolution API server exists.
seed_data_creation: Temporary WhatsApp channels created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Evolution API integration complete. Endpoints work but return graceful errors since no real Evolution API is configured. All 5 channel types displayed in UI with proper config forms.

backend_apis: POST /api/auth/login - returns token with valid credentials
POST /api/whatsapp/create-instance - handles unreachable Evolution API gracefully (500 with connection error)
POST /api/whatsapp/send - returns 404 when no WhatsApp channel configured
GET /api/whatsapp/status/{instance} - returns graceful error state when no channel or when Evolution API unreachable
GET /api/whatsapp/qr/{instance} - returns graceful error state when no channel or when Evolution API unreachable
frontend_pages: /settings/channels page loads with dark luxury theme
5 channels displayed: WhatsApp Business, Instagram DM, Messenger, Telegram Bot, SMS (Twilio)
WhatsApp Connect button expands Evolution API config form
WhatsApp form has 3 fields: API URL, API Key, Instance Name
WhatsApp form has 'Generate QR Code' button
SMS channel expand shows Twilio config: Account SID, Auth Token, Phone Number
Telegram channel expand shows Bot Token field
All Connect buttons working with proper data-testid attributes

mocked_apis_note: Evolution API endpoints are NOT mocked - they make real HTTP calls that fail gracefully since no Evolution API server exists. This is expected behavior.

ai_integration_notes.evolution_api: NOT MOCKED - real HTTP calls to Evolution API, returns graceful errors
